channel.title: AI Signal Briefing
channel.description: Daily and weekly AI briefings shaped around agent systems and AI engineering

item.title: AI Signal Briefing | 2026-03-30
item.description: 今日最强信号来自 Agent architecture patterns：42 Agent Architecture Patterns: From Skill Repos to Intent & Harness Engineering https://t.co/nz

item.title: AI Signal Briefing | 2026-03-29
item.description: 今天还没有累计到足够的新发现，适合先看一级主题与高信号来源清单。
